title: Golden Transcripts, net.Pipe, Differential Tests, Fuzzing, Race, and Benchmarks · Runtime Contract: Golden Byte Transcripts
summary: Tests send one complete request through loopback, compare only status, reuse the implementation as its own oracle, fuzz without invariants, and publish benchmark throughput without fragmentation or adversarial peers. Planned artifact: Add and verify the golden byte transcripts increment in layered deterministic protocol verification system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use exact byte fixtures for valid, incomplete, malformed, normalized, serialized, and residual-buffer cases with readable semantic assertions.
Record low-cardinality phase, framing source, bytes, duration, terminal reason, peer class, and correlation without raw secrets or attacker-controlled labels.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Golden Byte Transcripts · Theory Golden Byte Transcripts
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory protocol team handles case 7686 in a regional status service with slow assistive and low-bandwidth clients. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate parser work on transcripts, fragmentation, differential, fuzz, and leak evidence; preserve this operating constraint: all attacker-controlled counts must be validated before allocation or slicing; then block extra QPACK streams and fall back without removing HTTP/2 availability. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
